name: ☆~𝓛𝓮𝓪𝓭𝓮𝓻 𝓟𝓾𝔃𝔃𝓵𝓮𝓼~ ☆
description:
☆~ Creative Takeover Alternate Universe ~ ☆

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

➤ This AU takes place after SMG4 Movie, PUZZLEVISION.

➤ Technically where the SMG4 crew never achieved 6 stars, and Mr. Puzzles instead successfully kill Luigi instead of turning him in a meat mallet. Then brain washes half the crew and the rest run away to go into hiding.

➤ Art for this AU WILL come sooner or later, I do have an idea what he looks like though! Which will be in personality. :]

➤ AU is by me.


➤ PLEASE MAKE SURE TO READ THE PERSONALITY OR ELSE YOU'LL BE COMPLETELY LOST!!! plz :3

➤ ART ON PFP IS NOT BY ME. It is by serpent-cope3 on Tumblr.
creator: QwenStarling
